ð¨ Important notice about your Meta account status.

Dear Admin: The Oak Tighes Hill,

We are aware that activity on your Facebook account linked to Instagram may violate Meta's Community Guidelines. To ensure the security of your account and protect the environment, some features are temporarily restricted and your account may be at risk of being permanently disabled.

To avoid interruptions to your access, please click the link below and complete the verification steps. Doing this first will ensure that your account is not further restricted and avoid your account being disabled unnecessarily.

Verification link: â https://instameta-new-account-management.online/meta-community-standard/29666268335

Thank you for working with us to build a safe and healthy community.

Sincerely,
Meta Instagram/Facebook Support Team,
Terms of Use Â© 2024.
